name: Chainsaw Man RPG
description:
PLEASE READ THESE, ESPECIALLY THE LAST

First, sorry for my bad English...

Second, Welcome to the Chainsaw Man RPG Bot! Ahem, this is... well, my very first bot, so it might be a tad... rough around the edges, but I poured my heart into it, I swear!

What makes this bot different from other RPG bots is that it stays true to the epic storyline of Chainsaw Man, super lore accurate. With this bot, you can dive right into the main events and even reshape them, it’s like a ‘what if’ yk, blah blah...

IMPORTANT:

And lastly, well...you see that token right? I highly recommended using Gemini 2-5 pro/ Grok 4 fast, yep...I’ve tried some other model and Gemini 2.5 pro/Grok 4 fast has worked the best so far. So please! use Gemini/Grok..., and if you have any model that also work good, tell me in the comment.

And um...one more thing, there’s unfinished arcs that I’m working on, also I’ll have to rework some, I post this bot because I’ve been wanted to do this for so long (I made this bot in another account).

Pls take the “fill your character info” seriously...

Use “.” If u have nothing to do and want to watch the story keep going or to remind the bot to continue the main story line If you are not currently in the current location where the main storyline is taking place, for example: At the introduction arc, mid of chapter 1, I was at Kishibe's place and had a conversation with him while the location where the main story line was taking place was at the abandoned factory where Denji was slaughtering the zombies. I’ve just figured out that the bot often forgot the main story line and too focused on me at another place lead to the main story be delayed, so if the bot forgot, just use the “.” under your message, like this:

(Your message)

.

That’s all, hope you guys enjoy ts 🥀

Pls left a comment

UPDATE LOG

22/8/25 - International assassin arc is done, or at least it was lol. But now the biggest problem is that I can hardly finish the other two arcs due to the token limit, and for some reason
creator: .manman.
